attacking_style: Not a natural attacker; occasionally makes opportunistic early breakaway moves for KOM points but primary focus is contesting reduced bunch sprints after selective racing.
team_tactics: Teams prioritize technical positioning over pure power leadout; excel at navigating final corners and capitalizing when better-resourced sprint trains falter or get disrupted
terrain_preference: Reduced bunch sprints after crosswind splits or selective racing; technical finales with challenging final turns that disrupt organized trains. Struggles in pure power sprints against top-tier leadout trains.
vulnerability: Requires disorganization or attrition to compete at WorldTour level; lacks raw speed to win clean mass sprints against elite sprinters with full trains
key_patterns: Wins come when opponent sprint trains fail or get disrupted (2 documented victories)
Teams succeed through superior technical positioning rather than raw leadout power (2 observations)
Late-career breakthrough suggests improvement in reduced/selective sprint scenarios (10-year career, first WT win 2023)
Capable of opportunistic breakaway moves for secondary objectives like KOM points when sprint unlikely
form_trajectory: positive: Achieved first WorldTour victory in 2023 after decade-long career, showing late-bloomer development in selective sprints
